summary: PDF Layout V2 testing completed successfully. All 29 backend tests passed. Visual verification of Quote, Invoice, and Order PDF previews confirmed the new .payment-auth-section grid layout is working correctly with signature+stamp stacked in auth-column on the right.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Layout V2 fully working. The new _payment_auth_html() function creates a grid layout with left content (bank details for invoices, terms for quotes, sales contact for orders) and auth-column on right with stacked signature-block + stamp-block. Stamp is 88px, signature max 110x42px. All page-break-inside: avoid rules in place.

quote_payment_box_terms.details: Quote left column has .payment-box with Terms & Conditions

quote_no_overflow.details: Quote has overflow: hidden to prevent horizontal overflow

invoice_payment_auth_section.details: Invoice has .payment-auth-section with bank details on left

invoice_bank_in_payment_box.details: Invoice bank details show in .payment-box (not old .bank-box)

order_payment_auth_section.details: Order has .payment-auth-section with sales contact on left
